title: Teaching an Online Christmas Ornament Workshop!
excerpt: So excited to be a part of this collaborative workshop started by Christy Tomlinson called the 2013 Artsy Ornaments of Christmas . It's the 3rd year she has done it and my first time participating. The line up of 12…
body:
So excited to be a part of this collaborative workshop started by Christy Tomlinson called the 2013 Artsy Ornaments of Christmas. It's the 3rd year she has done it and my first time participating. The line up of 12 artists is pretty impressive and I feel honored to be a part of this group. There's a great mix of artistry that will be demonstrated including papercrafting, fiber arts, painting, mixed media and more. This is a 5 day workshop, where each day you will get 3 new ornaments/homedecor/giftgiving projects by 3 different artists and teachers! PLUS a bonus project this year that you won't want to miss! In the end you walk away with a beautiful mix of everything you need to create a festive fun Holiday! This workshop is presented all in video, so you can watch along as these artsy girls show you step by step how to create adorable holiday projects. You will also have PDF"s and Supply Lists you can download to keep as well.

Once class begins you will have an entire year to access the workshop.. including videos, PDF's, and supply lists!

In the next few weeks we will be posting sneak peeks of what you can expect in THIS years workshop, but for now... here are some examples from this workshop in 2011 and 2012.As you can see just a good mix of wonderful artsy goodness! and these were just a sampling of what was created in the last two years. This year is bound to be our BEST year yet!

We would sure love to have you join us!

(remember your paypal confirmation of payment will be your registration confirmation until the workshop begins. Your Welcome email and Log-in email are sent out the morning the workshop begins on Tuesday November 19th before 10 am MST)

2013 Artsy Ornament of Christmas Workshop $24.95
